summary: Super Admin Profile Management Feature - Full testing complete. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working: My Profile button visible in header, Profile modal shows current email, name field, email field, and password change fields. Save Changes button with validation working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/superadmin/profile returns current profile (name, email, role)
GET /api/superadmin/profile requires superadmin authentication (returns 401/403 without auth)
GET /api/superadmin/profile excludes password from response
PUT /api/superadmin/profile can update name
PUT /api/superadmin/profile validates email uniqueness (duplicate check)
PUT /api/superadmin/profile requires current password to change password
PUT /api/superadmin/profile returns error if current password is wrong
PUT /api/superadmin/profile returns error if password too short (<8 chars)
PUT /api/superadmin/profile returns error when no updates provided
Superadmin profile endpoints require superadmin role
UI: My Profile button visible in Super Admin Dashboard header
UI: Profile modal shows 'Super Admin Profile' title
UI: Modal displays current email (superadmin@bijnisbooks.com)
UI: Modal has Name field pre-filled with current name
UI: Modal has Email (Login ID) field pre-filled with current email
UI: Modal has 'Change Password' section with Current Password field
UI: Modal has New Password field with '(min 8 characters)' hint
UI: Modal has Confirm New Password field
UI: Modal shows note about logout requirement when credentials change
UI: Save Changes button is present and enabled
UI: Cancel button present and closes modal
UI: Password mismatch validation shows toast error 'New passwords do not match'
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/superadmin/profile correctly excludes password field from response
PUT /api/superadmin/profile validates current password before allowing password change
PUT /api/superadmin/profile checks email uniqueness before allowing email update
Frontend properly shows toast error for validation failures (password mismatch, etc.)
Frontend correctly mentions user will be logged out after email/password change
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing superadmin account
context_for_next_testing_agent: Super Admin Profile Management feature fully implemented and tested. Navigation: Login as superadmin@bijnisbooks.com -> Super Admin Dashboard -> Click 'My Profile' button in header. Profile modal allows changing name, email (login ID), and password. Password change requires current password verification and minimum 8 characters. Changing email or password logs user out and requires re-login with new credentials. All API validations working (duplicate email check, wrong password check, short password check).

features: Can update email with duplicate check
Can update password with current password verification
My Profile button visible in header

important_note: As per instructions, actual credential changes were NOT persisted during testing to preserve the superadmin account. All validation tests were performed without committing changes.
